title: acrolasia nitens
intro: Acrolasia nitens, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential in reducing fever and relieving pain. Golden Ragwort can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
